# Opportunity Cost Calculator

> Free, private, installable web app (PWA) that compares what a purchase could be worth over time against investing or saving the money instead. Currency-agnostic (displays whole-dollar $ amounts). Runs entirely in the browser; no account, no server, no telemetry.

## What it does

Enter a purchase price and the app projects:

- **Asset** — how the thing you buy might change in value (depreciating, no change, or appreciating).
- **Alternative** — how the same money could grow if invested (~9.3% default) or saved (~3.24% default) instead.

Both paths use a shared inflation assumption (default 3%). The headline result is **worth at your retirement age** (default 67, Australian preservation age, configurable). Display modes: Worth of Asset, Opportunity Cost (default), or Worth of Alternative.

## Key features

- Live projections at 5, 10, 20, 30, and 50 years plus retirement at your chosen age
- Nominal and after-inflation columns; growth chart with year-by-year inspection
- Save scenarios to a local log with search; restore settings from saved entries
- Installable PWA with offline support after first visit (iPhone, Android, desktop)
- Light/dark mode; responsive two-column desktop layout
- All data stored in browser localStorage on device only; no account or telemetry

## URLs

- App: https://logwet.github.io/opportunity-cost/
- Source & full documentation: https://github.com/logwet/opportunity-cost
